title: Perfect Instance [Legacy]
description: Compilation of Vanilla Plus mods and resources in an optimized form. In one sentence - Perfect Instance
body:
## ![Perfect Instance text banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dae350cff4528d48998daed304862b0e4b933c7e_0.webp) **Perfect Instance** is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack that blends the classic feel of the game with modern enhancements. Ideal for players who value stability, performance, and immersive gameplay. ## ✨ Features - 🛠️ **Optimized**: Lightweight and fine-tuned for smooth gameplay, even on low-end systems. - ⚙️ **Improved mechanics**: Small tweaks and quality-of-life mods that make the game feel more polished. - 🧩 **UI & UX upgrades**: Cleaner interface, better menus, and helpful overlays. - 🔧 **Configurable**: Easy-to-adjust settings to match your playstyle. ## 🖼️ Screenshots *Check in modpack gallery* ## 📋 System Requirements | Component | Minimum Requirements | Recommended Requirements | |-----------|----------------------|---------------------------| | CPU | Intel i3 | Intel i5 or better | | RAM | 4 GB | 8 GB | | GPU | Integrated graphics | Dedicated 4 GB GPU | ## 📥 Installation 1. Download and install the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app). 2. Search for **Perfect Instance** in the app. 3. Click "Install" and enjoy your adventure! Or just click the download button up there and drop the file into modrinth! ## ⚠️ Information - The current version of the modpack may differ from the depicted actual gameplay on my channel - Legacy version has less content and is designed for weaker devices - The Ultimate version is the richest and most complete package and therefore its performance may be slightly weaker [Nozercode Personal Website](https://rezonoxo.github.io/nozercode/)
[Discord Server Invite](https://dsc.gg/nozercode) ### Miłej rozgrywki życzy Nozer Polska gurom 🇵🇱 :]
